import asyncio
from source import run_race

def test_async_counter_race_condition():
    # Run the race condition scenario; on buggy code the result will be < 50,
    # on fixed code it will be exactly 50.
    result = asyncio.run(run_race())
    assert result == 50, (
        f"Expected count = 50 after 50 concurrent increments, "
        f"but got {result}. This failure reveals the race condition."
    )
